projects.title: Granadilla
projects.cardSummary: Homework management system for schools, teachers, and students with a role-based backend and modern frontend.
projects.overview: Granadilla is a full-stack assignment management application with a Django REST backend and a Next.js frontend.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.summary: Built as a Next.js application with React state and API-driven UI for day-to-day teacher and student workflows.
highlights: Used React state and API calls to manipulate assignment, class, and user data from the backend.
Implemented responsive CRUD operations for tasks, classroom content, and related resources.
Integrated external image search functionality as part of content workflows.

backend.title: Backend
backend.summary: Django + PostgreSQL backend handling multi-user role flows and secure data access across schools, teachers, and students.
highlights: Implemented JWT-based authentication for secure session and API access.
Designed data models and relationships for users, classes, assignments, and permissions.
Managed role-based access rules for different user types across core operations.

projects.title: Image Search
projects.cardSummary: Standalone image-search component extracted from Granadilla and built as a focused React + Redux project.
projects.overview: Image Search is a compact project that demonstrates API-driven search UI and structured state management.
highlights: Built as a reusable image-search module similar to the one used in Granadilla.
Used Redux for predictable state management and query/result flow.
Handled API result rendering and user-driven search interactions in a clean component structure.

projects.title: Card Snap Game
projects.cardSummary: A card snap game designed to demonstrate realtime chat using websocket communication.
projects.overview: Card Snap Game combines interactive gameplay with live chat features powered by websocket events.
highlights: Implemented realtime chat communication between connected users using websocket events.
Built gameplay components and interactions for a fast-paced card snap experience.
Designed and illustrated game assets personally to support a cohesive visual style.

projects.title: Construction Company Website
projects.cardSummary: A multi-page Next.js website focused on UX, user journey, and marketing presentation for a construction brand.
projects.overview: This project showcases website design for a construction company with a focus on trust, clarity, and conversion-oriented content flow.
highlights: Structured page layouts around user journey goals and marketing communication.
Designed clear calls-to-action and service presentation for lead generation.
Implemented lightweight form submission for enquiry capture.
